name: Moto Rider: Highway Racing Game VR

reviews.review_description:
Excellent. Just like Traffic Rider on Amazon tablet. The one I've always wanted. This is a really great app. One of the best ever in the history of VR apps.
This app should win awards. This app is a gift from God.

developer_response.body: Wow, what a review! We're thrilled to hear you’re loving the game this much. Thank you for the 'award-winning' support—we'll keep pushing to make it even better. Ride on!

reviews.review_description: Hi graphics are okay. The controllers respond very well. At the price worth look as a pass the time game
This game has great potential……pls update❤️

developer_response.body: Thanks for the support! We’ve got some exciting updates in the pipeline that we think you’re going to love. Thanks for riding with us!
